selectedHealthIssues.label: IBD
selectedHealthIssues.description: IBD and sensitive stomachs differ. If your dog has been diagnosed with IBD by a specialist vet, then we don’t recommend Butternut. Recommendation from our in-house vet: "Your dog likely needs a hydrolysed diet. Talk to your vet about what will help best."

selectedHealthIssues.label: Struvite stones
selectedHealthIssues.description: Unfortunately, we do not recommend Butternut whilst your dog has Struvite stones. Recommendation from our in-house vet: "Talk to your vet about supplementing with DL-Methionine until the stones are gone."

selectedHealthIssues.label: Arthritis
selectedHealthIssues.description: Even with arthritis, your dog can still enjoy Butternut
